description: Documentation-first playbooks for issue triage, release checklists, and contributor onboarding across OSS projects.
readme_text:
Maintainer Handbook gives teams repeatable issue triage, release drafting, and contributor onboarding playbooks.

```bash
npm install
npm run docs:dev
npm test
```

The current workflows emphasize contributor onboarding, issue triage, and release preparation through docs and examples.
contributing_text:
## Common Commands
npm install
npm run docs:dev
npm test

Update docs, examples, and templates together when contributor guidance changes.
